entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Cereal grain crop, the focus of the study.

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources of sorghum, including accessions, races, and wild species.

entities.name: TRAIT
entities.description: Characteristics of sorghum, both qualitative and quantitative.

entities.name: QUALITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Observable characteristics of sorghum, not measured numerically.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Measurable characteristics of sorghum, expressed numerically.

entities.name: EARLY FLOWERING
entities.description: A qualitative trait in sorghum, flowering at an early stage.

entities.name: SHORT PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: A qualitative trait in sorghum, having a short stature.

entities.name: MEDIUM PANICLE EXSERTION
entities.description: A qualitative trait in sorghum, panicle protruding moderately.

entities.name: MEDIUM-SIZED SEEDS
entities.description: A qualitative trait in sorghum, seeds of medium size.

entities.name: BASIC RACES
entities.description: Categorization of sorghum germplasm based on characteristics.

entities.name: INTERMEDIATE RACES
entities.description: Categorization of sorghum germplasm, intermediate between basic races.

entities.name: WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Sorghum species existing in a natural, uncultivated state.

entities.name: COUNTRIES
entities.description: 34 countries from which the germplasm originated.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Activities aimed at improving sorghum cultivars.

entities.name: SORGHUM CULTIVARS
entities.description: Improved varieties of sorghum developed through breeding.

entities.name: GENETIC BASE
entities.description: The diversity of genes within a sorghum population.

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to group sorghum accessions.
